---
title: "Assessment and Research Guide"

order: 303
summary: "Assessment Guide."
source_url: "https://gisma-courses.github.io/gc/Theses_Evaluation.html"

  - gis-reproducible-research
Goals: []
activities: []
assessments: []
labels:
  - basic
  - mandatory
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/gis-reproducible-research/material-gis-reproducible-research-guide.md"
---

Read the assessment and research guide:

<https://gisma-courses.github.io/gc/Theses_Evaluation.html>

## Connected Module

- [Reproducible Research](../modules/gis-reproducible-research.qmd)
